title: Kitchen Mortar Pestle Set,Plastic Manual Garlic Grinder Spices Herbs Mortar Pestle Set Kitchen Grinding Bowl Guacamole Bowl Shell Garlic Pepper Press Grinder Crusher(Wood Color)
description:
About this item
Multi Purpose --- Mortar and pestle set can easily pulverize, guacamole, crush garlic, ginger, vanilla, pepper, nut fruit, coffee beans and various spices, when you add them to cooking, you can get the best taste.
Premium Material --- manual plastic garlic grinder is made of premium solid thick PP plastic.Ergonomic pestle is comfortable to hold, smooth won't hurt your hands after long time use.
Easy to Use --- Manual grinder helps you easily grind garlic and ginger into minced state or powder.Easily crushes garlic, ginger, herbs, dry spices, grains, teas, etc, so you can get the freshest flavors in your cooking.
Size --- Mortar Size(D*H): approx. 11*9cm/4.33*3.54in. Pestle Length: approx. 17.5cm/6.89in. This Mortar and Pestle will help easily crush a variety of spices, herbs, garlic, ginger and other ingredients for fresher flavors, rather than jarred herbs and spices.
Enhance Flavors --- By grinding your fresh herbs and seasonings you can help your dishes reach their full flavor potential.Use herbs and spices you've grown yourself or have raw, grind them up, and allow the flavor to shine through.
